sorry_locations.notes: WrapAngle: 6 rational wrap theorems need Mathlib floor arithmetic. Atmosphere: 3 sorry (densityRat_anti_mono_temp, tempAtAlt_lapse_rate, tempAtAlt_strict_anti) need mul_lt_mul_of_neg_left / ring. All other 21 files are sorry-free.

bugs_found.description: NaN safety violation in signNoZero<float> — returns 0 for NaN, violating ne_zero contract
negate<int16_t> involution error — INT16_MAX special case incorrect, negate(negate(-32767))=-32768
LATENT BUG (unconfirmed by FV): wrap_bin(bin, n) returns negative for bin <= -n; (bin + bin_count) still negative, C++ % yields negative result; callers use result as array index => UB

targets.name: Crc16Fold
targets.notes: buffer_crc16 fold/split property. crc16_append: streaming CRC correctness proved via List.foldl_append.

targets.name: Atmosphere
targets.notes: densityRat (ideal gas law), tempAtAltRat (ISA lapse rate). 3 sorry: anti-monotonicity in temp, lapse rate equality, strict anti-monotonicity. Exact rational model confirmed by correspondence tests.

targets.name: CommanderArmingFSM
targets.notes: 20 theorems, 0 sorry. armFSM/disarmFSM pure model. 9-bool ArmConditions. arm_denied_when_calibrating, forced_disarm_always_succeeds, trichotomy, sequential. Correspondence: abstraction. CORRESPONDENCE.md dedicated section added run60.

targets.name: ObstacleMathWrapBin
targets.notes: wrap_bin(bin, bin_count) = (bin + bin_count) % bin_count. LATENT BUG: for bin <= -bin_count, result is negative. All proofs by omega. Next: Phase 2 informal spec, then direct Lean file.

targets.name: SqrtLinear
targets.notes: Piecewise: 0 for x<0, sqrt(x) for 0<=x<1, x for x>=1. Provable: zero/identity branches, boundary at x=1, monotone x>=1. Sqrt branch: sorry (needs Real.sqrt from Mathlib).

targets.name: GetBinAtAngle
targets.notes: Depends on wrap_bin (#25). Float round needs Mathlib for complete proof.

correspondence_runs.notes: CommanderArming now has full correspondence section with guard mappings, divergences, and theorem annotations

run_history.task: Tasks 1+6: Research (3 new targets including wrap_bin latent bug) + Correspondence (CommanderArming.lean dedicated section)
Tasks 8+10: CommanderArming correspondence tests (4102/4102) + REPORT.md update
Tasks 7+6: CRITIQUE.md + CORRESPONDENCE.md updates for run49-56 additions

discoveries: density_mono_temp sorry: Rat.inv_lt_inv_of_lt does not exist in stdlib v4.29.0; needs Mathlib
Lean neg literal normalization: -27315/100 internally becomes -5463/20 (harmless for native_decide)
Commander FSM proof: rcases Bool.eq_false_or_eq_true on each Bool field generates concrete hypotheses, then simp_all closes trivially
crc16_append proof: List.foldl_append + simp/simp only closes all goals in one step
WrapAngle sorry: 6 theorem bodies use sorry (rational wrap, floor-dependent); integer wrap (wrapInt) is fully proved
wrap_bin latent bug: (bin + bin_count) % bin_count returns negative for bin <= -bin_count; C++ truncation mod of negative is negative
notes: Run 60: Tasks 1+6. Research: wrap_bin latent bug identified (bin <= -bin_count yields negative result). Correspondence: CommanderArming.lean dedicated section added. Next: Task 2+3+4+5 for ObstacleMath::wrap_bin (target 25); all proofs by omega.
